task: Launch-quality advanced task: Qubit Readout Threshold Calibration Audit. Reality context: a superconducting-qubit testbed needs threshold settings before algorithm benchmarking. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=state0_mean, metric2=state1_mean, metric3=readout_sigma, metric4=assignment_error_pct; records: R1 state0_mean=22.62 state1_mean=55.63 readout_sigma=31.27 assignment_error_pct=45.1; R2 state0_mean=73.65 state1_mean=3.25 readout_sigma=87.23 assignment_error_pct=92.4; R3 state0_mean=16.09 state1_mean=26.65 readout_sigma=3.7 assignment_error_pct=36.8; R4 state0_mean=59.43 state1_mean=3.34 readout_sigma=1.28 assignment_error_pct=44.9; limit_state0_mean=58.27; limit_state1_mean=52.75; limit_readout_sigma=49.48; decision_budget_usd=25000; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="certification workflow expected reproducible calculations and signoff rationale". Rules and constraints: Use worst-case scoring: normalize each metric to the embedded maximum, apply weights 0.40, 0.30, 0.20, 0.10, and classify the top quartile as immediate action. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: calibrate readout threshold and error budget; calculate derived metrics, classify every record, identify the smallest defensible intervention, and write the decision rationale. Deliver qubit_readout_calibration.ipynb + lab_note.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
